rulings.Case Title: RIMMA BOROKHOV et al VS. FREEDOM WEST HOMES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 1, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT RAYMOND BROWN, MACK WATSON and THETIUS PINKARD's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Continued to September 4, 2013 to be heard after Plaintiff's motion for partial reconsideration. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Omtion For An Order Permitting Discovery Of Deft'S Financial Condition And Net Worth After Default Was Entered And Relief Therefrom Was Denied;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 1, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF CAITLIN FITTING's Motion For An Order Permitting Discovery Of Defendant's Financial Condition Continued to August 16, 2013. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than August 2, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIKHAIL GOLOMB VS. MICHAEL DAVILA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Motion To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 1, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF MIKHAIL GOLOMB's Amended Motion To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JUAN MENA VS. IVAN GUTIERREZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discvoery Responses To Form Interrgoatrories, Requests For Admissions, And Requests For Production Of Documents; For Order Deeming Facts Admitted
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 1, 2013, line 4. PLAINTIFF JUAN MENA's Motion To Compel Discvoery Responses To Form Interrgoatrories, Requests For Admissions, And Requests For Production Of Documents GRANTED, subject to opposition. Requests for Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant shall serve responses to outstanding written discovery within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant shall reimburse Plaintiff's costs of $60 within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOUNIR KARDOSH VS. JOHN HAYES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 1, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF MOUNIR KARDOSH's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint GRANTED. Proposed amendment does not "contradict" prior judicial admission; it supplements Plaintiff's pleadings. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RKI INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. EDWARD JELINEK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 1, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT BEAU HAWKINSON's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall file his answer no later than August 1, 2013 by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARCHSTONE SOUTH MARKET, LLC VS. KING LEI AND ALLAN CHU INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 1, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS LOUIE's Motion To Quash DENIED as untimely. Defendant failed to comply with CCP 1167.4. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JOHNNY BLUE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 1, 2013, line 8. PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTREA INVESTMENTS AND TRADING LLC VS. DOUGLAS RAMIREZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 1, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT RHANDA GLASGOW's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action under CCP 1161a and is not uncertain. Applicability of SFRO to pre-judgment claimant's alleged tenancy is an issue of fact not appearing on the face of the complaint. = (501/REQ)
